# Igor Popov

> Senior iOS Engineer with 15+ years of experience. Product-oriented, focused on Swift, SwiftUI, and Swift Concurrency, with a strong interest in spec-driven, AI-agent-assisted product development. Based in the Wroclaw Metropolitan Area, Poland.

## Identity

- Full name: Igor Popov
- Also known as: ipopov
- Website: https://ipopov.dev
- Location: Wroclaw Metropolitan Area, Poland
- Role: Senior iOS Engineer, Product Owner, Technical Leadership, AI agents
- Languages: Russian (native), Ukrainian (native), English (full professional)

## Professional summary

- iOS app developer with 15+ years of experience building mobile apps.
- Skilled in Swift, SwiftUI, and Swift Concurrency with a product-oriented focus.
- Practices spec-driven product development enabling autonomous, agent-driven 10× AI-powered delivery.
- Built products that have surpassed 1B downloads globally.
- Led full mobile cycles: idea → planning → release.
- Coordinated design, development, and QA for aligned delivery.
- Strong in app analytics, localization, and feature A/B testing.
- Focuses on engineering clean, efficient, and resilient apps.

## Top skills

- iOS app development (Swift, SwiftUI, Swift Concurrency, Objective-C)
- Project management
- Digital marketing
- Growth hacking
- Technical leadership
- A/B testing and app analytics
- AI-powered and agent-driven development workflows

## Experience

### Super Unlimited Inc. — iOS Senior Software Engineer
- October 2021 – Present (Worldwide)
- Contributor to a #1 App Store VPN app with 1B+ downloads.
- Migrated 80%+ of Objective-C features to Swift.
- Modularized the app structure via Swift Package Manager.
- Doubled AdMob show rate through full ads refactoring and A/B tests, driving significant revenue growth.
- Integrated CI/CD using Xcode Cloud.
- Developed several VPN domain-specific features.
- Built remote, customizable paywalls via Adapty and Firebase.
- Improved app crash-free rate to 99.9%.
- Authored technical documentation for existing and new features.
- Established and implemented iOS team development processes.

### Aura — iOS Senior Software Engineer
- January 2019 – May 2021
- Owned and implemented several core application features as a senior iOS engineer.

### Brightgrove Ltd. — iOS Senior Software Engineer
- March 2018 – January 2019
- Worked on a telecommunication iOS product providing video chat and voice calls.
- Tech: Swift, Objective-C, VoIP, SIP, REST, legacy code modernization.

### EPAM Systems — iOS Senior Software Engineer
- November 2017 – January 2018
- Consultant providing architectural solutions for large legacy iOS e-commerce projects.

### Akvelon, Inc. — iOS Senior Software Engineer
- July 2017 – November 2017 (Kharkiv Region, Ukraine)
- Developed a social network application from scratch in Swift for Microsoft.

### Freelance — iOS Developer
- January 2017 – May 2017 (Worldwide)
- Took several iOS projects from idea to the App Store.

### DataArt — iOS Senior Software Engineer
- December 2013 – December 2016 (Ukraine)
- Full-time outsourcing and outstaffing for US clients.
- Prototyping, support, and development of iOS applications.
- Project durations 3–12 months; team sizes 1–8.
- Roles: Developer, Senior Developer, Team Leader.

### GlobalLogic — iOS Software Developer
- October 2012 – September 2013
- Developed R&D MVPs in the healthcare field.
- Tech: OpenCV, BTLE (Bluetooth Low Energy), fitness devices, real-time video processing, REST.

### Gameloft — iOS Game Developer
- July 2010 – October 2012 (Kharkiv)
- Developed multiplayer games for iOS and Windows platforms.
- Tech stack: iOS, OpenGL, C++, Objective-C.
- Notable projects: Six-Guns (2011, networking/multiplayer), Fishing Kings (2010, in-game shop and f2p model), Zombiewood (2011, networking/multiplayer).

## Education

- National Aerospace University – Kharkiv Aviation Institute
- Bachelor's degree, Computer Software Engineering (2007 – 2011)

- Hiring iOS developers from Eastern Europe
